parameters.query:
INSERT INTO kpi_history (kpi_name, kpi_value, status, threshold, timestamp)
VALUES
  ('catalog_quality_score', {{ $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.catalogQualityScore }}, '{{ $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.catalogQualityScore < $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.thresholdQuality ? "ALERTA" : "OK" }}', {{ $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.thresholdQuality }}, '{{ $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.timestamp }}'),
  ('avg_priority_score',     {{ $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.avgPriorityScore }},     '{{ $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.avgPriorityScore > $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.thresholdPriority ? "ALERTA" : "OK" }}',  {{ $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.thresholdPriority }}, '{{ $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.timestamp }}');

INSERT INTO reposition_priority (execution_ts, product_id, product_title, stock, rating, price, priority_score, rank_position)
SELECT
  '{{ $('Calcular KPIs').item.json.timestamp }}' as execution_ts,
  (product->>'id')::INT,
  product->>'title',
  (product->>'stock')::INT,
  (product->>'rating')::DECIMAL,
  (product->>'price')::DECIMAL,
  (product->>'priorityScore')::DECIMAL,
  row_number
FROM json_array_elements('{{ JSON.stringify($('Calcular KPIs').item.json.top5Critical) }}'::json) WITH ORDINALITY AS t(product, row_number);
